title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Disha Publication - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Disha Publication - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Disha Publication invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Kanpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Disha Publication:
Disha Publication is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Disha Publication!
